case_title: WEBCOR CONCRETE, A DIVISION OF WEBCOR CONSTRUCTION VS. STATEWIDE ASSOCIATION OF COMMUNITY COLLEGES JOINT et al

docket_entries.description: NON-OPPOS TO PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEBCOR CONCRETE, A DIVISION OF WEBCOR CONSTRUCTION  LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT STATEWIDE ASSOCIATION OF COMMUNITY COLLEGES JOINT POWERS AUTHORITY'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FILED A NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION ON JUNE 28, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID L. BLINN OF LOW BALL & LYNCH, TEL. NO. 981-6630 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STATEWIDE ASSOCIATION OF COMMUNITY COLLEGES JOINT POWERS AUTHORITY'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay is Granted.
